name: dropdown-menu
title: Dropdown Menu
description: Fluent 2-styled dropdown menu with shadcn APIs. Built on @base-ui/react's Menu for portalled positioning, focus management, keyboard navigation, type-ahead and submenus; the flyout matches the kit's Select surface (Fluent shadow-16 elevation, 32px rows) and check/radio indicators use CheckmarkRegular plus a filled-circle marker on brand-neutral accent states.
author: graundtech <https://github.com/graundtech/fluent2-react-kit>
docs:
Composition uses Base UI's `render` prop, not shadcn's `asChild`. To use the kit `Button` as the trigger, pass it via `render`:

```tsx
<DropdownMenuTrigger render={<Button variant="outline">Open</Button>} />
```

`DropdownMenuLabel` is a group heading (Base UI `Menu.GroupLabel`) — place it inside a `DropdownMenuGroup`. `DropdownMenuSub` wraps a `DropdownMenuSubTrigger` and a `DropdownMenuSubContent` (which re-composes its own portal/positioner/popup). See `dropdown-menu.tsx`'s doc comment for the full Base UI mapping table and the numbered divergences from the shadcn/Radix API.
